inst.name: JSONConverter1
inst.short-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT_1
inputport-instance.description: Receives message in XML format or JSON Object.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT_1
outputport-instance.description: Sends JSON object or XML message depending on the conversion mode used.

inst.name: FTOFS
inst.short-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml/ofs message and transforms into ofs message/xml respectively.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of ofs message transformation.

inst.name: FTOFS1
inst.short-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml/ofs message and transforms into ofs message/xml respectively.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of ofs message transformation.

inst.name: OFSConverter7
inst.short-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: OFSConverter component transforms data from XML format to Open Financial Service (OFS) message format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml/ofs message and transforms into ofs message/xml respectively.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of ofs message transformation.

inst.name: XMLTOJSON
inst.short-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.
inst.long-description: JSONConverter component is used to convert data from JSON format to XML format and vice-versa.

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT_1
inputport-instance.description: Receives message in XML format or JSON Object.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT_1
outputport-instance.description: Sends JSON object or XML message depending on the conversion mode used.

inst.name: Telegram3
inst.short-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment
inst.long-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment

inputport-instance.name: messenger__POST__Request
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by REST service

outputport-instance.name: messenger__POST__Response
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of REST service invocation

inst.name: SMS1
inst.short-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment
inst.long-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment

inputport-instance.name: cbs__POST__Request
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by REST service

outputport-instance.name: cbs__POST__Response
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of REST service invocation

inst.name: Monitoring
inst.short-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment
inst.long-description: RESTConsumer component serves as a client to access exposed Restful services in Fiorano environment

inst.name: FTLOG
inst.short-description: The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion, stored procedure execution or table monitoring
inst.long-description: The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion, stored procedure execution or table monitoring

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Accepts data related to queries in XSD format

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Sends out results of the execution of SQL statements on the database

inst.name: T24Outbound
inst.long-description: T24outbound service sends OFS messages to T24-R22 systems

outputport-instance.name: Response
outputport-instance.description: Sends the messages to next component in workflow.

inst.name: T24Outbound1
inst.long-description: T24outbound service sends OFS messages to T24-R22 systems

outputport-instance.name: Response
outputport-instance.description: Sends the messages to next component in workflow.

inst.name: T24Txn
inst.long-description: T24outbound service sends OFS messages to T24-R22 systems

outputport-instance.name: Response
outputport-instance.description: Sends the messages to next component in workflow.

inst.name: Xslt1
inst.short-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML
inst.long-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

inst.name: Xslt2
inst.short-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML
inst.long-description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.
